title: IB A1
content: For IB A1 you should be able to complete Strategy 1 and Step 1of Strategy 2. A screen shot of your account with these transactions should satisfy the deliverable requirement for this assignment. Please make sure you do the trades today or tomorrow while the markets are open. Our hard deadline on this assignment is tomorrow, Tuesday Nov 4th at midnight.
